arts.ttl: Chelsea defender Veiga joins Juventus on loan
arts.sum: Chelsea defender Renato Veiga joins Juventus on loan for the rest of the season.

arts.ttl: Losing the first game of the season could be good for Juventus
arts.sum: Juventus has suffered their first Serie A defeat of the season after Napoli staged a comeback to beat them… The post Losing the first game of the season could be good for Juventus appeared first on Juvefc.com.

Juventus have officially announced the signing of Renato Veiga, a promising defender from Chelsea, as they bolster their squad for the remainder of the season. Following successful medical examinations at JMedical, Veiga is now set to wear the number 12 jersey, previously held by Alex Sandro. The post OFFICIAL: Juventus Sign Renato Veiga appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: OFFICIAL: Chelsea defender Renato Veiga completes Juventus transfer
arts.sum: Chelsea defender Renato Veiga has officially joined Juventus on loan until the end of the season. Veiga has now secured a fresh start - and a chance to play centre-back - as Juventus have pounced on his availability, signing him on a six-month loan.
